meta.title: Fireside Chat: Who Needs To Step Up?
meta.description:
Paul Griswold recently left Honeywell after 5 years as their Chief Product Officer, Cybersecurity. He had a first hand view of what vendors, integrators, and asset owners are and are not doing to address OT cyber risk.

After 20 years of working on OT cyber risk management most are disappointed in the progress made. If go back to 2015, didn't you think we would be further along in 2025.

Dale and Paul has a candid conversation on where the varioius entities need to improve for progress to be made. What's holding them back. Where credit and blame have been earned in the last decade. And what can realistically expect given the business drivers all the players face.
